name: Mathmech Induction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>斬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>納</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ノウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All Cyberse monsters you control gain 500 ATK. If you control a "Mathmech" monster: You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Mathmech Induction" once per turn.
eff: All Cyberse monsters you control gain 500 ATK. If you control a "Mathmech" monster: You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Mathmech Induction" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
